code_anchors.what: scoreDescriptionItem additive sum: score = BM25_WEIGHT(50)*bm25 + vectorWeight(30)*cosine + salience(15/8/0) + recency(+25) + locality(+100/50/25)
code_anchors.why: heterogeneous uncalibrated scales — W3 RRF/normalize replaces L1101+L1110; BM25 raw ~2-4 unbounded, cosine [-1,1], structural signals fixed ints

code_anchors.why: W1 must thread entry.score past L466 into _recallEntrySchema + recall map

code_anchors.what: order: top_k cap(L445) → ratio-floor(L462, hasQuery-gated) → related(L490) → trimToPayloadBudget(L576)
code_anchors.why: top_k+ratio ALREADY relevance-ordered (post-sort). OPEN: does trimToPayloadBudget trim TAIL (relevance-correct) or arbitrarily? In mcp-payload-guard. VERIFY — may downgrade W2 pain severity

code_anchors.what: bm25ModelCache module-level in-memory single-slot, key=computeReadSetRevision sha256
code_anchors.why: Bm25Model is a CLOSURE — not serializable. Disk persist requires extracting internal stats (perDoc/documentFrequency/avgFieldLength bm25.ts:82-125) + rehydrate scoreDoc. MAIN W2 cost

code_anchors.why: W5 replaces substring with planContext scoring; must preserve SearchItem shape + filters + lifecycle visibility

model already CJK. REAL blocker: fastembed is optional non-declared dep (vector-retrieval.ts:40), lazy-loaded, returns null→text fallback if absent. W4 = address package availability, NOT just flip flag

key_insights: W2 reframed: truncation is already relevance-ordered (post-sort). Real question = trimToPayloadBudget tail-trim vs arbitrary. If tail-trim, the 'byte-trim误杀相关' grill claim is overstated — the pain reduces to 'thin item so byte闸少触发' + score visibility.
W2 disk-cache true cost = Bm25Model closure not serializable → extract+rehydrate internal stats.
W4 true blocker = optional fastembed package availability, not the config flag (model already CJK default).

W5 gap: planContext reads canonical only (buildCrossStoreRawItems); pending search through it needs (a) teach engine to walk pending corpus, (b) re-apply isVisibleByLifecycle + layer/maturity/tags/created_after filters, (c) handle pending drafts lacking maturity/relevance_paths/created_at → degrade to BM25-text.

W3 has NO numeric-scale tests; behavior locked INDIRECTLY via ordering asserts in plan-context.test.ts (1433 lines) + plan-context-scope-rank.test.ts. RRF correctness = re-validate orderings + ADD RRF-specific unit tests.
